repair_candidate.summary: Repair #94015 on the contributor branch after a working executor rechecks current main and confirms the stale post-compaction payload path. Preserve the existing contributor PR and credit because the branch is maintainer-editable and the diff is narrow.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(voice-call): use pre-compaction replies for TTS
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repair the existing #94015 contributor branch if direct source inspection confirms voice-call TTS is reading stale or empty post-compaction payloads.
- Keep the fix scoped to preferring pre-compaction `onBlockReply`/block reply payloads for voice-call TTS without changing TTS policy, compaction policy, or voice-call configuration.
- Credit @xialonglee and source PR #94015 for the original implementation path.

## Verification
- pnpm check:changed
- pnpm test extensions/voice-call/src/response-generator.test.ts
- /review

Refs: fixes #79521; source PR #94015.
credit_notes: Preserve source PR credit for @xialonglee via https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/94015.
Keep #94015 as the repair target when direct checkout verification confirms the defect is narrow and current.
